title: Laches by defendant forfeits defenses
doc_html:
§152.  Laches by defendant forfeits defenses

Failure of a defendant to file his answer timely or to serve copies thereof timely constitutes a waiver of all his defenses to the suit.  

Added by Acts 1958, No. 204, §1.
